# ATB. (At The Beyond)

> ATB. is an AI-native product and consulting company built for the customer frontline. We imagine, build and forward-deploy AI products for everywhere a business meets its customers — operations, commerce and marketing — and help clients rebuild their systems, products and services to be AI-native.

Founded 2025. Global. Legal entity: At Beyond Limited. Contact: info@atbeyond.com

## What ATB. does

Frontier AI advances every month, but almost none of it reaches the store floor, the drive-through or the field. Consultancies can't move at the pace; generic software was never built for these teams. ATB. closes the gap with shipped products, not decks: production-ready AI Blueprints you can subscribe to, forward-deploy to your exact reality, or co-create at the frontier — plus the consulting partnership to make your wider business AI-native. Commercial models are tied to outcomes, not headcount.

## Products (Blueprints)

- FrontlineOS (live): an AI-native operating layer for frontline teams — voice-first guidance, real-time knowledge, and a seamless line to the contact centre and back office. Proof: 40%+ frontline productivity; live with Burger King UK.
- CommerceOS: AI-native commerce bridging frontline staff, contact-centre agents and customers. Proof: 15–25% revenue uplift.
- MarketingOS: a unified marketing intelligence and experience layer across the whole stack. Proof: 50%+ cost reduction; 10× faster campaigns.

## How to engage

- Subscribe & Deploy (AI Blueprints): hosted, production-grade frontline AI from day one.
- Forward Deploy (Customise & Accelerate): Blueprints shaped to your brand, workflows and systems.
- Frontier Advisory (Co-Innovate & Pioneer): new capabilities co-created at the edge of AI.
